_comment: Copy this file to .spotify-creds.json (gitignored) and fill in your own values. Used ONLY to map a Qobuz track to its Spotify track id by ISRC, so Qz Lyrics can fetch its synced lyrics. Stays local; never committed.
_how_to_get: Go to https://developer.spotify.com/dashboard -> Create app (any name; Redirect URI can be http://localhost ; check Web API). Open the app -> Settings -> copy Client ID and Client secret.
